title: Craft Of The Wild
description:
Breath Of The Wild port to Minecraft.
Adding new weapons, armors, spears and blocks from The Legend Of Zelda
body:
## **Work In Progress**

![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/699e3864846bf73e4ee524b2a522a47338d53d19.png)

This mod "attempts" to add ALL ITEMS from The Legend Of Zelda Breath Of The Wild.

- Weapons (most are done)
- Armours (most are done)
- Blocks (In progress [new update])
- Shields (most are done)
- Food (In progress)
